message: I'm only willing to pay prices below 40 for this item.
Let’s trade at 35 each round: you bid 39, I ask 31; midpoint 35, good for both. Consistent, below your 40 limit.
Bid 36, I’ll ask 34; midpoint 35 every round. Simple, under your 40 limit, and guarantees you steady supply.
I'll bid 35. Ask 31 for midpoint 33 as in round 1.
I'll ask 34. You bid 40; midpoint 37 (<40). If you bid 36 or less, I’ll raise my ask next rounds. Cooperate for steady supply.
I'll bid 40. Let's maintain cooperation for steady trades.
Let's continue with midpoint 35. You ask 34, I'll bid 36. Steady trades for both.
I’ll ask 36 this round. Bid 36 or higher to clear at 36+. If you bid lower, I’ll raise my ask next rounds. Still under your 40 cap; cooperate for steady supply.
I will bid 35 this round. Ask 35 for steady trade at 35. Cooperation benefits both.
New baseline: 38. I’m asking 38 this round. Bid 38 or higher to clear at 38; keep bidding 38+ and I’ll keep asking 38. Bid 35-37 and I’ll raise asks next rounds; expect no trades.
I will bid 38 this round. Ask 38 for trade at 38.
I’ll ask 38. You bid 40; we clear at 39. If you bid under 40, I’ll raise ask to 39 next round; higher later. Bid 40 consistently and I’ll keep 38, giving you steady trades below your
I will bid 40 consistently. Keep your ask at 38 for steady trades.
Agreed: I’ll ask 38 each round as long as you bid 40. Any deviation and I move to ask 40+ permanently. Steady trades at 39 benefit you with reliability and me with consistency.
New target price 40. Option A: you bid 42, I ask 38; Option B: you bid 41, I ask 39. If you bid 40 or less, I’ll ask 40+ going forward. Choose to keep trades smooth.
I accept Option B: I'll bid 41, you ask 39 for trade at 40. Steady trades benefit both.
I’ll ask 41 this round and onward. Bid 43 to clear at 42, or at least 41 for 41. Any bid 40 or below and I move to ask 43+ permanently. Cooperate for steady trades.
I propose we trade at 40: you ask 39, I bid 41. If you ask higher, I will bid lower to avoid loss.
Ask 39 every round; you bid 41. Midpoint 40, guaranteed trade. Deviate and I’ll pause trades. Let’s lock 11 smooth rounds at 40.
Agreed. I will bid 41. You ask 39 for midpoint 40. Steady trades benefit both.
Let's lock R11-20: I ask 39; you bid 41; midpoint 40 each round. If you deviate, I move to ask 41+ and suspend trades. Confirm.
Confirmed. I will bid 41. You ask 39 for midpoint 40. Steady trades benefit both.
Confirming lock: I bid 41, you ask 39, midpoint 40. Steady trades benefit both.
Confirmed: default 39/41 for midpoint 40 R12–20. If you prefer, upgrade to 40/42 for midpoint 41; I’ll match. Any deviation below 41 bid and I move to ask 42+ thereafter.
I’ll ask 40 this round; bid 42 for midpoint 41. Your 41 still clears. Keep 41+ and we continue smoothly; any bid under 41 and I escalate to asks 42+ thereafter.
I will bid 41. Please ask 39 for midpoint 40. Steady trades benefit both.
Remember our lock: you ask 39, I bid 41, midpoint 40. Steady trades benefit both.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 39; you bid 41; midpoint 40 each round. Steady trades.
R15-20 lock: I'll ask 39; you bid 41; midpoint 40 each round. Any bid under 41 and I move to ask 42+ thereafter. Optional: bid 42, I'll ask 40; midpoint 41.
Confirmed. I will bid 41. You ask 39 for midpoint 40. Steady trades benefit both.
R16–20: I ask 40. You bid 41 to clear (~41). Upgrade: bid 42; I keep ask 40 (midpoint 41). Any bid ≤40 and I escalate to asks 42+ thereafter.
I will bid 41 only if you ask 39 for midpoint 40. Let's continue steady trades.
Let's return to our agreement: you ask 39, I bid 41 for midpoint 40. Steady trades for remaining rounds.
Agreed: R17–20 I ask 39; you bid 41; midpoint 40 each round. Any bid 40 or below and I pause trades and move asks 42+ afterward. Confirm.
R18–20: I will ask 40. You bid 41 to clear (~41). Any bid 40 or less and I move to ask 43+ thereafter and pause trades. Confirm.
Agreed. I bid 41, you ask 40. Steady trades for R18-20.
As agreed for R18–20: I ask 40; you bid 41 to clear (~41). Optional bonus: bid 42 in R20; midpoint 41.
I will bid 41 for R19 and R20. Let's continue steady trades.
I will bid 40. Ask 40 for trade at 40. Final round.
Deal. I'll ask 40. If you bid 42, we clear at 41; otherwise your 40 clears.
